name: ToolDispatch
description: 工具 framework receives 工具 呼叫 與 populates ctx.輸出budget
actions: Read tweaks.cfg tool_output_budget_default and per-tool override
Compute ctx.outputBudget = parsed override or min(round(C*0.3), 50_000)

name: ProduceNaturalOutput
description: 工具 runs its read/exec/fetch 與 produces would-是 輸出 string
actions: Estimate token count of natural output via estimateTokenCount

name: DecideBudgetVerdict
description: Compare natural-輸出 token estimate against ctx.輸出budget

transitions.guard: estimate > budget AND tool is sliceable
estimate > budget AND tool refuses to slice (apply_patch)

name: PassThrough
description: 輸出 fits; 返回 verbatim, 無 hint appended

name: SliceOnSemanticBoundary
description: Cut 在 工具-natural unit (line/比對/訊息/paragraph)
actions: Choose semantic unit per tool (read=line, grep=match, read_subsession=message, etc.)
Greedily accumulate units until token budget reached
Stop on last full unit that fits

name: FormatTruncationHint
description: 追加 plain-language hint 使用 literal anchor token
actions: Compose exact arg adjustment text (offset=1500 / msgIdx_from=200 / narrow pattern)
Append [Truncated] anchor + fraction + adjustment as trailing 1-3 lines

name: RaiseToolError
description: 工具 cannot produce useful slice (e.g. applypatch diff 是 atomic)
actions: Raise structured error with tool name, requested size, budget

name: ToolReturn
description: 工具 結果 string forwarded 到 runtime; runloop appends 到 訊息 串流

name: CompactionEntry
description: Session壓縮.執行({SessionID, observed, 步驟}) called 由 runloop
actions: Bind KIND_CHAIN = [narrative, replay-tail, low-cost-server, llm-agent, chunked-digest]

name: PickNextKind
description: Walk 到 下一個 kind 在 KIND CHAIN

name: AttemptKind
description: Invoke kind's executor; 供 chunked-digest enter dedicated subgrafcet

transitions.guard: kind != chunked-digest AND executor returned summary

name: WriteAnchorFromKind
description: 追加 助手 訊息 使用 summary===true holding digest

name: VerifyAfterCompact
description: Re-estimate 提示 size against 依-請求 budget

name: FinaliseSuccess
description: 壓縮 succeeded 與 verified; runloop continues

name: EscalateToNextKind
description: Current kind failed verify-after-compact 或 structurally; advance

name: TerminalUnrecoverable
description: All kinds exhausted; raise structured 錯誤 到 runloop
actions: Include hint: an individual round exceeds digest per-chunk floor

name: ChunkedDigestStart
description: Enter chunked-digest 路徑
actions: Identify system prompt and trailing unfinished round (excluded)
Identify closed rounds (user msg + assistant with all tool_calls resolved)

name: SplitIntoChunks
description: Group rounds 進入 分塊 的 ~chunkeddigest分塊目標tokens
actions: Walk rounds, accumulate until chunk ~= target tokens, emit chunk, repeat

name: DigestChunkLoop
description: 供 k = 1..N, 請求 digest 的 分塊 k under framing 提示

name: ValidateDigestResponse
description: Check 回應 shape 與 absence 的 工具calls

transitions.guard: response is valid JSON digest, no tool_calls

name: RetryWithStricterFraming
description: Re-issue 分塊 k 使用 stricter framing 提示

name: MergeDigest
description: 合併 digest分塊k 進入 digestsofar

name: FinaliseDigestAnchor
description: Write merged digest 作為 Anchor; re-attach trailing unfinished round
actions: Append assistant message with summary===true holding merged digest
Re-append original triggering user request after Anchor

name: RaiseDigestToolCallError
description: Digesting LLM persistently emitted 工具calls despite framing

name: RaiseDigestTooLarge
description: Round set exceeds chunkeddigestmax分塊 even 於 目標 分塊 size
